full_text:
Hi all, we will meet on Tuesday for the last time this year. I suggest
the following agenda:

**1. Expansion CycIF experiment summary**

- Anniina will ask saun to report the markers

- HR-status, PFS,PFI OS, Age, Drugs, Follow-up,

- CRS request from Anni

- Nika organizes the data, illcorr and stitching happens in csc

- Segmentation with mesmer will be tried, try segmenting nuclei and
 > cytoplasm

- Qualifai qcs out the artifacts well, with higher precision than
 > manual qc. Ask the collaborators can we adjust the confidence?

- Optimistic timeline: primus in february, aligning of cycif and geomx
 > data in february

**2. postXenium tCycIF experiment summary**

- not all areas are 100% focused (4 samples on the same slide.
 > different thickness?)

- in the future check the rcpnls in the folders carefully

- many antibodies for xenium samples in didnt work

- some markers are unfocused while the nuclei are focused

- include the mhc2 stainings of the cancer cells in the nki paper

- tissue integrity for xenium samples is really good

**´**

**3. Xenium ideas \@Ada Junquera \@Sara Palomino**

- sharing files with Matias (accessing the data through p-drive?)

- pairing the rna velocity with the protein data

- think of specific questions we want to ask from xenium, expansion
 > cycif (3-4 very specific questions)

ta through p-drive?)

- pairing the rna velocity with the protein data

- think of specific questions we want to ask from xenium, expansion
 > cycif (3-4 very specific questions)

- do we want to validate the findings functionally or prognostically

**4. Bulk/ scRNAseq \@Sara Palomino**

- Sara seing clusters with ccnd1 and mki67 in bulk rnaseq, will show
 > it soon

- Sara waiting for second batch of RNA sequencing

Arrange the call for collaboration with Leuven in mid January (Anniina
part of the meeting)
